programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky discovers a wad of cash in Lucy's purse and closet full of strange valuables and assumes they're all her ill-gotten gains. He doesn't realize Lucy has been legitimately collecting for her club's fundraising bazaar.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy feels left out when Ricky's two Cuban friends visit and converse mainly in Spanish. When she learns that little Renita, someone Ricky once danced with, is coming to town, she insists they reunite for a number.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel acquire a walk-in meat freezer. In an attempt to save money, they order two sides of beef, not realizing this is a tremendous amount. Hundreds of pounds of meat and $483 later, they must figure out a way to unload the beef.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is the emcee for a television variety show and Lucy wants to appear in one of its commercials. To prove to her husband that she has screen presence, she removes the inner parts of their TV set, gets into it, and does a commercial as he arrives home.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: As a publicity stunt to further Ricky's career, Lucy pretends she's an exotic princess from "Franistan" who has traveled halfway around the world to see Ricky perform. She books a suite at the Waldorf-Astoria and gets a lot of press attention.

programme.desc: When Lucy screws up a dinner appointment with Ricky's new boss, Mr. Littlefield, and his wife because she is late, Ricky puts her on a strict time schedule. Later Ricky meets with Littlefield to discuss his possible promotion to manager of the club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky begins wearing a hat around the apartment because he thinks he's going bald. Lucy thinks he's worrying needlessly but goes to a store that specializes in hair restoration in order to help Ricky feel better.

programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were pursuing Flight 107 when Soviet Union planes suddenly shoot it down for wandering into its territory inadvertently.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A ring called the Star of Alaska holds a single wheat seed inside it. The seed is a new species of wheat that can grow in minus 40 degrees and the CIA and KGB are determined to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin is over the moon, now that he's won Fujiko's hand in marriage after stealing Marie Antoinette's wedding dress and ring.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A massive amount of gold is being transported in the cover of darkness, but on this rainy night, Lupin is busy being a bartender to a beautiful woman named Sara.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal an exquisite painting of a young girl from a Renoir art exhibit. Using the painting as bait, Lupin and his gang plan to steal Ghellon's impressive art collection.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: John Decker, an oil tycoon from Colorado hires Lupin to steal the US presidential limousine and promises to pay 10 million dollars in return.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang were scoping out their next target, Macintosh Jewelry, the world's most expensive jewelry store when they end up inadvertently saving a young boy who was being kidnapped.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang make off with the New York Mafia's secret cash hoard. However, the suitcases were filled with old newspapers and as retribution, the mafia puts a hefty bounty on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang blow up Fontaubert Bank's underground safe to steal 5 tons worth of gold, but someone has beaten them to it. The thieves are a pair of disguise artists named John and Mary.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Eagle of Helazard from a luxury cruise ship, but Fujiko betrays them at the last moment and makes off with the Eagle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata is even more determined to capture Lupin after an incident with Anne. Lupin and his gang will soon learn that Inspector Zenigata is a force to be reckoned with when he's raging mad.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon has been thrown into prison for a crime he did not commit. He is charged with cutting off the Little Mermaid's arm.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: A mysterious army steals 3 tons worth of gold under Inspector Zenigata's watch. His superiors are convinced Lupin stole the gold and holds Inspector Zenigata responsible.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin has lottery fever, or to be specific, has his eyes set on the 50 million dollar jackpot. However, Lupin discovers the lottery is rigged.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/27/2021: José Urquidy strikes out seven and Jose Altuve cranks a solo home run to lead the Astros to a 7-2 win over the Braves in Game 2 of the 2021 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/29/2021: Rookie starter Ian Anderson tosses five hitless innings and the Braves' bullpen carries the combined no-hitter into the 8th inning, before falling six outs shy of history in Game 3 of the 2021 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/30/2021: Dansby Swanson and Jorge Soler hit back-to-back home runs in the 7th inning to lead the Braves to a 3-2 win over the Astros in Game 4 of the 2021 World Series

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/31/2021: The Astros climbed out of an early hole and completed the comeback victory thanks to a balanced attack on offense, forcing a Game 6 in the 2021 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 11/2/2021: Jorge Soler and Freddie Freeman homer, while Max Fried strikes out six to lead the Braves and the city of Atlanta to their first World Series championship since 1995.

programme.title: MST3K: Mad Monster
programme.desc: Things get hairy on the Satellite of Love thanks to the lupine antics of The Mad Monster (1942) and the second chapter of Radar Men from the Moon (1952).

programme.title: Laserblast
programme.desc: A teenager discovers a laser weapon left behind by turtle-like aliens. He uses it for petty revenge, but the weapon slowly changes his personality.

programme.title: MST3K: I Accuse My Parents

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Hellcats
programme.desc: Joel and the 'bots attempt to puzzle out what's going on in the unintelligible biker film, The Hellcats (1968). Flashbacks from earlier episodes fill out the host segments.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera Vs. Zigra
programme.desc: The seventh offering from Gamera: the infamous turtle faces off against an alien called Zigra determined on world domination. Joel and the Bots build a scale model of Gamera and make shoebox dioramas.

programme.title: MST3K: Gamera
programme.desc: A giant mutated turtle wakes from eons of slumber and attacks Japan in Gamera: The Giant Monster (1965). The Bots create their own beauty salon and are treated to a visit from Gamera himself.

programme.title: MST3K: Fugitive Alien
programme.desc: Movie constructed from two episodes of a Japanese television show. An alien marauder becomes a fugitive from his planet Valnar's Star, then joins the Earth spaceship Bacchus 3 to fight against his former masters.

programme.desc: Timmy wishes that nobody needs sleep; Timmy thinks his parents would be better off without him so he wishes that he wasn't their son.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy goes back in time to try to change Mr. Crocker's past so that he will be a happier person in the present.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for master kung-fu skills in order to fight a bully; Timmy travels back in time and encounters a crazed witch-hunter.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that the entire world would be quiet; Chester and A.J. are suspicious of Timmy's sudden popularity.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Problems occur when Timmy leaves his Crimson Chin comic on the side of his bathtub; Timmy wishes for the height and skills of a basketball superstar.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy enters Cosmo and Wanda as goldfish in a contest at school; Timmy wishes his long forgotten imaginary friend to life.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Chip Skylark's voice in order to win the lead in the school play; Timmy and Vicky are trapped in a cave after an avalanche hits Mt. Dimmsdale.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Vicky uses underhanded tactics to try to win a beauty pageant; Timmy wishes that he can read people's minds.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that Tom Sawyer could come out of his book and help him with his book report.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Wanda gives Timmy a magic photocopier; the police mistakenly think Timmy's parents are dangerous outlaws.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy discovers a plot to destroy the Crimson Chin's reputation; Timmy wishes for access to Vicky's diary.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that everything he says is right; Timmy gets to be placed with the big kids.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that his baby sitter were nice; Pixies purchase Fairy World.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Vicky to find the perfect boyfriend; Timmy wishes that he were the funniest person on Earth.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that the whole world could be like his Crimson Chin comic book.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy's friends get tired of how he treats them; Timmy wishes that he has no feelings.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes that his parents had some new friends; Timmy wishes that he and Trixie were the only two people on Earth.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy must find a replacement for his father in the Father-Son Squirrely Scout competition; Vicky baby-sits Timmy at her house.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Mark Chang seeks Timmy's help in hiding from his fiance; Timmy must undergo a program that will teach him to make responsible wishes.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda receive invitations to their high-school reunion; Timmy wishes he were the strongest guy on the beach.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy tries to help the star of a superhero television show; Timmy accidentally releases a genie from a magic lava lamp.

programme.title: The Fairly OddParents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes he could do the opposite of what his parents tell him; Timmy wishes for the body of a teenager.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Didi le trae un divertido y suave juguete a Tommy llamado Goober para reemplazar a Reptar. Carlitos se encariña con Goober mientras que Tommy no. Cuando Dil destruye todos los juguetes de los Rugrats, la doctora Susie los arregla.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos moja la cama una noche, y Carlos se preocupa. Los Rugrats deciden ayudar a su amigo a despertarse seco. Los Rugrats juegan a ser exploradores, pero Dil se pierde y pasan todo su tiempo buscándolo.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos rasga su camisa, y Carlos le compra una nueva, lo que lleva a Carlitos a pensar que ya no es la misma persona. Cuando Didi oculta el tarro de galletas del abuelo, Angélica convence a los bebés de que lo busquen o morirá de hambre.

programme.title: Aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Carlitos tiene una pesadilla en la cual todos se encogen de tamaño, excepto Dil, el gigante. Angélica se gradúa de la escuela de protocolo y sus nuevos modales se ponen a prueba cuando Carlota recibe a un importante huésped.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid sospechan que el nuevo vecino del edificio es, en realidad, La Tormenta, su luchador favorito. Un anciano gana el kart con el que Carl soñaba, pero él está dispuesto a demostrarle que lo merece más que nadie.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Carlitos se embarca en una aventura salvaje para ganar su animal de peluche favorito en un juego de arcade. Carl toma la chancla de Rosa.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Cuando el divertido papá de Frida llega de visita, Héctor intenta recuperar la atención de sus nietos. Ronnie Anne y Lincoln están listos para un día de bromas y Sid también quiere participar.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Después de que una recaudación de fondos para el zoológico sale mal, Sid debe salvar el día con su familia.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Sancho se mete en problemas, por lo que Sergio intenta adiestrarlo para convertirlo en una mascota modélica. Preocupado de que Lori se haya enamorado, Bobbi visita a Lori en la universidad y trata de impresionarla con su habilidad jugando al golf.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Los Casagrande preparan a Lalo para la audición en la que quiere ser elegido el nuevo compañero canino de Phoebe Powers. Con los adultos fuera, Bobby y Carlota se turnan para cuidar a los niños e ir a una fiesta.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Carl necesita obtener la aprobación de un grupo musical antes de que su nueva canción pueda sonar en la radio. Ronnie Anne y sus amigas luchan por el espacio del gimnasio jugando al balón prisionero.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Después de ver los impresionantes movimientos de giro de CJ, Par ayuda a CJ a entrenar para una competencia. Cuando Adelaide pierde un diente, Carl y Bobby le enseñan sobre el Ratón, el hada de los dientes de América Latina.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid intentan conseguir el autógrafo de Yoon Kwan y Carlota ayuda a Alisa a prepararse para el Festival de Música de Great Lakes City.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y sus amigos ayudan a la señorita Kernicky a conseguir el puesto de profesora de Educación Física, pero sus clases no son ninguna broma. Ronnie Anne y Sid no saben si puede seguir siendo mejores amigas por culpa de un secreto.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Héctor finalmente se une al equipo de fútbol de sus sueños. Mientras preparan bao para la Feria Cultural China, Sid y Adelaide se enfrentan a bandidos que viejan en el tiempo.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Sergio solicita la ayuda de Adelaide para convertirse en un caballero y recuperar a Priscilla. Rosa escucha una predicción de Ernesto Estrella de que María y Arturo podrían volver a estar juntos.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Cuando Carl lleva el "truco o trato" demasiado lejos, debe devolver sus dulces al duende del vecindario.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y sus amigos reclutan a Carlos X como su entrenador en un skate-off contra Tony Hawk. No aguantando más a los matones en la escuela, Alexis aprende algo de Carl.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: El sueño de Bobby de tocar en una banda finalmente podría hacerse realidad, pero debe juntarse con los amigos punk de Par. Preocupado por no estar a la altura de sus geniales amigos, Sameer intenta batir un récord de credibilidad callejera.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Planeando la quinceañera de Ronnie Anne, Rosa decide entrenarla durante los próximos tres años. Carlos mete a Carl en el ajedrez para evitar que se meta en problemas, pero Carl se toma literal el gobierno del reino.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Los Casagrande celebran la boda de Paco, pero necesitan encontrar las arras que Sergio perdió.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Héctor rechaza la oferta de Rosa de unirse a su clase de baile, pero rápidamente se pone celoso de su talentosa instructora.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Adelaide y Carl luchan para ganar las insignias de guardianes del zoológico, pero su pelea podría arruinar las oportunidades de ambos. Héctor descubre que Vito tiene una cuenta enorme en el mercado y Vito se ofrece a devolverle el dinero.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne está nerviosa por volver a subirse a su tabla después de una mala caída. Un artefacto poderoso está llegando al museo de Great Lakes City y trae consigo una tormenta para los Casagrande.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Cuando el trabajo del Sr. Chang podría ir a parar a un conductor de tren más rápido, tiene que demostrar que puede ser igual de rápido. Adelaida quiere ayudar a los gatos de la ciudad a limpiar sus actos para ser adoptados.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Arturo lleva a Bobby al bosque para enseñarle técnicas de supervivencia. Frida le pide a Carlota que pase un día con ella en el spa.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Bobby y Par deben resistirse a los tesoros de la tienda. La familia intenta evitar que Hector propague rumores.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Una niña de 11 años se adapta a su nueva vida en compañía de su familia mexicano-estadounidense, la cual regenta un mercado que abastece de productos a todo el barrio.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Una niña de 11 años se adapta a su nueva vida en compañía de su familia mexicano-estadounidense, la cual regenta un mercado que abastece de productos a todo el barrio.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne consigue la pasantía de su vida con Bruno. Carl sueña con participar en el espectáculo de medio tiempo en un partido de los Gatos y se infiltra con Alexis y la banda escolar.

programme.title: Legends of the Hidden Temple

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony searches for the soul of Russia, both old and new.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony considers "going bamboo" in Indonesia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony goes on his own personal odyssey to analyze the Greek diet.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores the diverse cuisine and gorgeous landscapes of Chile.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony visits Kerala, an Indian state untouched by Western franchises.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony travels into the Kurdish region of Iraq and Turkey.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony tests the culinary landscape of Prague.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony tries clam tostadas from a street cart that may be the world's best.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony finds himself completely seduced by the mystifying country of Vietnam.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony experiences the building boom that has taken place in Dubai.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Anthony Bourdain sets out to rediscover the energy he loves in New York.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony goes to the US/Mexico border to explore food, culture and hospitality.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony steps away from the tourists and into the Venice of Venetians.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony finds modern city life and traditional village customs in Malaysia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony is ready to discover what it is that makes Laos so unique.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony explores the tough, infamous neighborhood of South Boston.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: No Reservations
programme.desc: Tony heads to Mexico with Carlos, who took over Tony's old job.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Kaliegh is 23 but has been a heroin addict for 5 years. Her mom, best friend, and an ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sarah and Gaylon are 17 with a 7-month-old daughter. Gaylon has paternity doubts because Sarah admitted to sleeping with two other men before she became pregnant! His mother wants him to take a DNA test to move on with his life!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Denese and her mom return because they know Dejon fathered Denese’s daughter! Plus, Rebecca has been here 6 times for 7 DNA tests and returns for her 8th and 9th tests!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Linda is cheating on her boyfriend EJ with his dad Earnest! Yolanda wants Eddie to help take care of their child, but can she handle the results of the DNA test? Later, 2 teens get the DNA test that might change their lives forever!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Teen mom Casie is dead set on proving Casey is the dad. Is Dirk the father of Brooke’s baby? Which brother fathered Miranda’s baby? Brandon denies both of Me'Chelle's kids but even his mother is on Me'Chelle's side!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Ashley found her own cousin's panties in her boyfriend Jeff's gym bag and photos of them in the club. Is he cheating on her? Then, will Brandy's cheating evidence prove her hunches right? Later, Patricia's best friend has a shocking secret!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m 14 and I Want a Baby
programme.desc: Shalonda is here to tell her mother, Shondra and Steve that she’s ready to have a baby!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Shaquita admits to cheating on Danny with Ashley to escape his abuse, but how will Ashley's man react? Then, Latasia and Mike vowed to stay off social media, but he claims she broke their promise with Facebook and a dating site account!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Diane is here to prove to John that he fathered her 2 kids. He was with Nicole and cheated with Diane. Both women got pregnant within 2 months. John did it again and Diane got pregnant, but he became abusive. Can Steve clear up this baby drama?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Is My Husband the Abuser?
programme.desc: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her problematic ex Scott. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: First, Linda has slept with her daughter's husband, Torrey. Now he wants nothing to do with his mother-in-law or his marriage! Next Juan had sex with his fiancee's transsexual uncle and he's here to plead forgiveness from her.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Can Kim get rid of her husband's meddling ex-lover? Next Daron says he loves his girlfriend, Jessica, but has never fully ended his relationship with his ex, Sarah. Then Tammy wants her boyfriend, Dave, to stop sleeping with his old girlfriend.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Chrishon denies he’s engaged to Taiwana with 3 weeks until their wedding. Lauren confronts her ex for leaving her for another woman while pregnant! Dave still wants Leesa’s love.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Rob hates his brother, Steve, and can't wait to tell him that he's sleeping with his fiancee and she's going home with him! Next Meg will make it clear to her boyfriend that she is serious about her unusual fantasy of having sex with clowns!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: James is engaged to Amanda but now comes clean about Melanie. Next Jewel competes for her mistress' love when Christa proclaims that she wants the lover for herself!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a shocking person!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has to reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John pesa casi 700 libras y no podría ser más feliz. Su novia Kim le hace elegir entre ella y un sándwich de 3 metros de largo. Él elige el sándwich.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Carla ha estado siendo infiel a su novio con su mejor amigo y su hermana! Después, Yvonne le contará a su amiga Marie que ha tenido relaciones sexuales con su novio. Mary Sue y su amante secreto, Cory, han venido a confrontar al novio de Mary Sue, Scott.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Jamie le ha sido infiel a su novio con una mujer! Después, Steve cree que su esposa ha sido infiel con otro hombre. A continuación, LaToya viene a causar un conflicto familiar. ¡Ella ha estado siendo infiel con la hermana de su novia!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jennifer se niega a dejar ir a su ex-novio, Marcus. Dice que lo recuperará a toda costa. Luego, Eddie dejó a Glinda y a su hijo de dos años hace 16 años. Hoy, Glinda le dice a Eddie que quiere que vuelva.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Angelo está aquí para contarle a su novia que es mujer. Luego, Mikey ha traído a su novia para contarle que le ha sido infiel. Después, Jennifer siente que debe decirle a su amante la verdad sobre su sexualidad

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nicole quiere recuperar a su novio, pero solamente si él termina su trío. Mesha ha estado enamorada del mejor amigo de su marido, Jamie, por cuatro años, pero no acepta un "No" como respuesta.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mehren dice que todo estaría bien con su novio, John, si su esposa los dejara en paz. ¡Greg ha venido a decirle a su novia que le ha sido infiel con su mejor amiga, Yolanda!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Greg le contará a su novia, Deidra, que trabaja en secreto como prostituto gay. El novio de Madrina sigue siendo infiel a ella con su ex. Después, Ro-Ro tiene dos novias y hoy la obligarán a elegir a una de ellas.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Cliff quiere que Anna, la mejor amiga de su novia, los deje en paz. Después, el marido de Kelly le ruega que lo acepte de regreso, pero Kelly no quiere porque ya está con el hermano de su marido.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Gail quiere más emociones en su vida, por lo que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su mejor amiga. Después, Dave se entera de que su novia de los últimos 3 años tiene una aventura y está dispuesto a todo para recuperarla, incluso ponerse un sostén.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, tenemos a madres y padres muy enfadados en negación. ¡Estos hombres juran que es imposible que sean los padres de los hijos de estas mujeres! Pero, ¿y si tienen razón? ¿Qué respuestas darán los resultados de ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los invitados del episodio de hoy de MAURY tienen secretos que revelar, pero ¿se arrepentirán de contarlos? Hay relaciones en peligro. Puede que haya corazones rotos. ¿Podrán estas parejas sobrevivir a los secretos que amenazan con separarlos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, en MAURY, terminó la espera. Finalmente mostramos los resultados emocionantes de las pruebas de paternidad de ayer. Además, las nuevas parejas están cruzando los dedos para recibir las respuestas que quieren.

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.desc: The Cajun Pawn Stars look to engineer a deal on a railroad express box from the 1800s. A customer takes a shot at selling a powerful World War II 50-caliber gun, and Jimmie tries to land photos from Apollo 13's historic splashdown.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: While cruising through South Carolina, looking for leads, the guys call an old picking contact and soon find themselves in Bill's main street hardware store. The family business has been operating since the 1880s.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Cruising along the California coastline, the guys know they're in for something big. Mil Blair founded the iconic motorcycle magazine Easyriders and, for the first time ever, the legend is willing to sell some of his rare collections of motorbikes.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys are dreaming of a California mega score when they stumble upon a salvage yard that's been in a family for generations. The place looks promising...but the owner has never let anyone inside. Can Frank and Mike talk their way in?

programme.title: Killer Elite
programme.desc: A special-ops agent must rescue his mentor.

programme.title: Bloodsport
programme.desc: Ninjitsu master Frank Dux journeys to Hong Kong to enter the Kumite, the Olympics of martial arts, and meets a beautiful American reporter. Before long he must face Chong-Li, a vicious Korean master of Tae Kwan Do, in a climactic fight to the finish.

programme.title: Overdrive
programme.desc: Scott Eastwood stars in this action-adventure from the writers of 2 Fast 2 Furious and the director of Taken. When two legendary car thieves are caught stealing from a mafia boss, they are given a week to nab a vintage Ferrari, or risk losing everything.

programme.title: Gladiator

programme.desc: Oscar® night. Will someone please kick that numbskull off-stage? Wait! That’s no ordinary numbskull. That’s Lt. Frank Drebin, crashing the ceremonies to stop a terrorist plot!

programme.desc: Benny Ninja, famous for his posing skills, teams up with supermodel Vendela to teach the girls the different stances for catalog, commercial and couture shoots by pitting them against each other in a posing battle on the streets of New York.

programme.desc: A look at never-before-seen footage of the cycle 10 contestants that includes the ladies battling with posing instructor Benny Ninja and his team, New York City firefighters practicing their runway struts and contestant wrestling matches.

programme.desc: The All Star queens reunite to dish about the most shocking, glamorous and sickening moments of the season. Hosted by the Emmy Award winning RuPaul.

programme.desc: Twelve All Stars arrive to compete for $100,000 and a chance to become the first inductee into RuPaul's Drag Race Hall of Fame. In the season premiere, the queens have to produce high fashion editorial photo spreads.

programme.desc: The queens find themselves battling for laughs while impersonating their favorite celebrities on "RuPaul's Gaff-In" with Vicki Lawrence's "Mama", who is joined on the judge's panel by actress Busy Phillips.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: The skull-busting war clubs of legendary Chief Crazy Horse take on the blazing rifles of Mexico's revolutionary hero Pancho Villa in this warrior match-up.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: This season of Alone features a brand new challenge as seven pairs of family members are dropped miles apart on Northern Vancouver Island, where they must find each other and survive together.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Ten survivalists from previous seasons return for redemption and a second chance to win the $500,000 prize. This time, they face the dangers of Northern Mongolia, a location more remote than they've ever seen.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: The wheels start turning when four bladesmiths must forge friction folders from a rusty pickup truck. The salvaged steel proves temperamental, causing a few of the blades and smiths to crack under the pressure.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths take a stab at history when they are tasked with recreating an iconic fighting knife from the 20th century: the Fairbairn Sykes. However, replicating the blade is only half the challenge.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don enlists Charlie's help when the bodies of five young Asian girls found washed up are suspected of being infected with the Avian influenza virus.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team must stop a suspected serial killer who drugs and kills young women, on the second season finale of Numb3rs.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While Don and his team are faced with trying to capture a 30-year-old teacher and her 17-year-old boyfriend/student who are on a violent cross-country crime spree, one of their own gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Desperate to rescue their fellow agent, Don and his team close in on finding Megan, who is being held hostage by a disturbed teacher (Kim Dickens) on a vicious crime spree.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Renowned motivational speaker Will Sterling is kidnapped at his mansion minutes before his limousine arrives to take him to the airport for an out-of-town seminar.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jesse Prince, a female ex-cop turned bounty hunter, vanishes after being shot at in front of a fugitive's home. Jack and the team look through her past cases for potential suspects.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team try to find 12-year-old Eric Miller, who was last seen in the boys' bathroom at his school. Eric's blood was found on a mirror shattered during an apparent scuffle

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Four years ago, a young woman, Jessica Raab (AMANDA FULLER), went missing. Vivian uses a new lead from a fingerprint match to convince Jack to get the team involved in Jessica's case.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for an injured soldier, Private First Class Kevin Grant, who recently returned from war. Upon his homecoming from Iraq, Grant discovered that his business went bankrupt.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: George Stanley argues with his wife at her hair salon, leaves to deposit the day's earnings, and never returns. The team finds signs of a struggle in the back room of the salon.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: While searching for Julie Cochran, who disappeared on the morning she was scheduled to leave town, the team soon suspects her live-in boyfriend, Greg Knowles.

programme.desc: After Martin's Aunt Bonnie (VALERIE MAHAFFEY), a feeble cancer patient and nurse, vanishes for several hours, her concerned husband and adult daughters summon Martin to help find her.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Mark Wilson, who disappeared while trying to prove the innocence of his death-row inmate son, Ricky, scheduled to die in two days.

programme.title: Without A Trace

programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer who dreamed of Hollywood stardom, a crazed patriot who plotted against Mussolini, and the brilliant visionary who carved Las Vegas out of the dry Nevada desert, Bugsy had it all. Rating: R

programme.title: Capote

programme.title: King of New York
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: Kill The Irishman

programme.title: Jamesy Boy

programme.title: Fresh

programme.title: Chasing Amy
programme.desc: Cult comic-book artist Holden falls head-over-heals with fellow artist Alyssa, but for that love to live, he'll need to contend with his disapproving best friend Banky, her sexuality, and his own misgivings about himself in this Kevin Smith classic.

programme.title: Prozac Nation

programme.title: Party Girl

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: Airline pilot Whip Whitaker miraculously lands his plane after a mid-air catastrophe but questions arise as to who or what was really at fault.

programme.title: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: A disillusioned war veteran, Rannulph Junah, agrees to play a game of golf. He finds the game futile until his caddy, Bagger Vance, teaches him the secret of the authentic golf stroke.

programme.desc: Have you ever seen a kid in a candy store? Their excitement pales next to a chef in a market. Take an exhilarating morning trek to the Central de Abastos, among the world's largest markets, with Rick Bayless and Chef Eduardo "Lalo" Garcia.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Eat your veggies is a line that children from Mexico to Morocco hear from their parents. Meet a pair of chefs, Israel Montero and Alfredo Chaves of Kaah Siis Restaurant, who grow, cook, and consume their own garden-fresh vegetables.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Jorge Vallejo is among Mexico City's rare chefs. His food has inspired Rick and Deanne for many years, but what inspires Jorge? One word: Tacos. Rick follows Jorge on a taco tour, from Tacos Gus to Taqueria Los Cocuyos, it is taco time.

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Sonora’s coast on the Sea of Cortez, where local legend Toño Contreras gives her a tour including shellfish on the beach, his restaurant Mariscos El Rey, and his home kitchen for some crave-worthy recipes.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati makes three classic Sonoran recipes, each one a meal in itself: a fish special called pescado zarandeado, a rich stew called gallina pinta, and a tasty dirty rice with clams. In Sonora, she visits vacation destination Puerto Peñasco.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table

programme.title: Iron Chef

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.desc: When ordered to serve a year in rehab, actress Candy (Drew Barrymore) hires her on set stand-in to take her place. The unassuming woman flips the script and steals her identity, career and boyfriend in this hilarious comedy about trading places.

programme.title: The Fabulous Stains
programme.desc: The media and disaffected teens mistake the acerbic rants of an obnoxious teenage punk rocker as a rallying cry for the women of America, launching her and her talentless group to national stardom.

programme.title: Uptown Girls
programme.desc: Molly Gunn is the daughter of a late rock legend, and the toast of New York City. But when her inheritance is stolen, Molly is forced to do something she's never done before - get a job. Molly becomes a nanny to a girl, who is "eight going on forty.

programme.title: CAROLINA
programme.desc: Julia Stiles and Oscar winner Shirley MacLaine headline this charming romantic comedy in which a young woman tries to escape the eccentric ways of her wacky Southern family and meet the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Black Snake Moan
programme.desc: A God-fearing bluesman takes to a wild young woman who, as a victim of childhood sexual abuse, looks everywhere for love, never quite finding it.

programme.title: Heathers

programme.title: Saved!

programme.title: Ghost World
programme.desc: The story of neo-cool Enid and Rebecca who, faced with graduation from high school take a hard look at the world they wryly observe. When Rebecca focuses her attention on mutual romantic fixation Josh, the girls friendship is forever changed.

programme.title: Boyhood

programme.title: Bone Tomahawk
programme.desc: When a group of cannibal savages kidnaps settlers from the small town of Bright Hope, an unlikely team of gunslingers, led by Sheriff Hunt (Kurt Russell), sets out to bring them home.

programme.title: Eden Lake
programme.desc: A young couple travels to a remote lake quarry in England, only to fend off a group of teenage hoods.

programme.title: Catacombs
programme.desc: Horror unfolds when a naïve American makes her first trip to Paris and is invited to an underground rave party in the city's catacombs.

programme.title: Wolf Creek

programme.desc: Horror unfolds when a naïve American makes her first trip to Paris and is invited to an underground rave party in the city's catacombs.

programme.title: Brawl in Cell Block 99
programme.desc: When Bradley (Vince Vaughn) is sent to prison, he is forced to commit acts of violence that turn the place into a savage battleground.

programme.title: The Travel Bug

programme.title: The Travel Bug

programme.title: Travel In Style
programme.desc: It's a royal theme in part one as we stay in the royal mile of Edinburgh in Scotland. In Switzerland we discover the lake based city of Geneva.

programme.title: Travel In Style

programme.title: Travel In Style
programme.desc: This time we visit Milan the home of fashion and chic in Italy. In part two we are all at sea, well more on river to be truthful in beautiful Burgandy.

programme.title: Travel In Style

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: The Champagne region of France bubbles over with fine wine, gourmet cuisine, picturesque towns, and gothic spires. We base in Reims, home of the historic cathedral where French kings were crowned. From Reims, we tour wine country.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: The Swiss Alps reverberate with cowbells, accordions, and laughter. We make our home base in the year-round playground of Interlaken, the "town between two lakes". We sail across glacial Lake Brienz, famous for its beautiful woodcarving.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un devastador tornado F-5 ha barrido el sur de Oklahoma, y el hospital es el principal centro de trauma para las víctimas heridas. Cuando un paciente gravemente herido es llevado urgentemente a la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una dama de honor se encuentra en un coma peligroso; el globo ocular de un hombre sale de su cabeza; un bebé prematuro es abandonado en el baño del hospital y debe ser revivido rápidamente en la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una joven embarazada en trabajo de parto le ruega al médico de urgencias que mantenga su embarazo y el parto en secreto de su padre; los gemelos comparten síntomas similares y confusos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una madre y su hijo de 6 años son llevados rápidamente a la sala de emergencias del Dr. Kevin Veale después de un horrible accidente automovilístico. El cirujano ortopédico Dr. Douglas Lundy encuentra que su experiencia médica no es suficiente.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El Dr. Warren Yamarick se enfrenta a uno de los momentos más difíciles de la medicina: tratar a su propio colega. El Dr. Armand Dorian pronto descubre que su sala de emergencias está inundada de estudiantes borrachos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico trata a tres víctimas de disparos que afirman ser transeúntes inocentes, pero la policía quiere saber quién disparó a quién.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente se presenta con un fuerte dolor de cabeza, luego le salen hematomas en las piernas y su médico no tiene idea por qué.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad, un hombre vestido como Santa está cerca de la muerte: su esposa le pide a su médico un favor especial: cosechar el semen de su esposo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El muslo de una mujer está atravesado con un trozo de barra de refuerzo; un hombre lleva a su novia a la sala de emergencias para un estudio de ETS, y ella es la paciente más extraña que el médico haya visto en su vida.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El Dr. Sean Bush, experto en mordeduras de serpientes de fama mundial, se enfrenta a su peor pesadilla. Dra. Dee L’Archeveque cuando trata a un hombre con un palo de golf atravesado directamente en su cabeza.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer que inhaló gases tóxicos ahora cree que sus vecinos quieren matarla; un hombre está al borde de la muerte después de que una flecha le atraviese el pecho y corte los cables de su marcapasos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una serpiente de cascabel mortal muerde a un hombre, pero por razones religiosas no puede recibir una transfusión de sangre. ¿Sobrevivirá?

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre piensa que está estreñido, pero su condición es potencialmente mortal; un médico que trata a una mujer con un paro cardíaco descubre que está tratando a dos pacientes en uno; y la familia del paciente no tiene ni idea.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Kayla starts to deal with her second pregnancy. Rachel is due any day but her family is forced to worry about her sister instead. Kiaya questions Teazha's commitment to their relationship. Brianna gets shocking news from an old high school friend.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Brianna gets a paternity test for Braeson. Kayla finally tells her mom the news about her pregnancy. Rachel gives birth and makes a decision about the birth certificate. Ashley and Bar try to revive their relationship with a trip to LA.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley tries to have carefree girls weekend in Vegas. Brianna consults a lawyer. Rachel resents being compared to Malorie. Kiaya struggles to keep her cool with X'Zayveon's mom. Kayla tries to find a way for Izaiah to see his dad.

programme.desc: Rachel deals with consequences of not knowing who Hazelee's father is. Kiaya visits X'Zayveon in prison. Ashley goes to LA and Bar overreacts. Brianna's patience is tested. Kayla has a reaction when Luke finally makes a decision about school.

programme.title: Teen Mom: Young + Pregnant
programme.desc: Ashley and Bar each take steps to move on. Kayla reaches a breaking point with Stephan. Rachel struggles to fit Drew into Hazelee's life. Brianna wrestles with a decision. Kiaya and Teazha both lose their temper.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Arturo quiere comprobar la verdad sobre el oro y reta a Alcides a probárselo, lo cual compromete a Hugo a entrar a la mina. Soledad está muy confundida por el cambio que ha dado Alcides.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le dice a Ricardo que Alberto está en pleno uso de sus facultades mentales y puede rendir testimonio de la agresión. Pero los dos llegan muy tarde. Fríamente, Antonia le corta el flujo de aire y le habla a su examante, mientras lo ve morir.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El compromiso de Lucho y Verónica es un hecho, la señora Dantés presenta a su futuro esposo ante los Lobos. Ella le advierte a Antonia que, como enemiga, puede ser la peor de las pesadillas. Ricardo no puede ayudar a Max y Francisca está desconsolada.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: La pasión entre Ricardo y Patricia crece cada día. Verónica se presenta ante los Lobos como la nueva inversionista y le explica a Antonia que su exesposo árabe tenía minas en los Emiratos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Constanza se reencuentra con su hijo cuando él va a visitar a Verónica. Antonia acepta la sociedad con Verónica. Aníbal enfrenta a su hijo, sabe que le ha declarado la guerra. El juez Villegas se molesta cuando Patricia le presenta a una sexóloga.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hortencia escucha cuando Bustillo menciona que tiene que matar al viejo, ella le dice a Martín que no tome ninguna pastilla que le den. Los Reyes y las Elizondo subastan las joyas de Eduvina.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Raquel le aclara a Benito que toda la herencia va a ser para Ruth, aunque estén molestas y tengan diferentes opiniones sobre los Reyes. Fernando piensa en otras formas de presionar a Gabriela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela grita para que Raquel la escuche y la ayude, la amiga va al sótano y la ve amordazada, al no poderla liberar huye y tiene un accidente fatal. Se cumple otro sueño premonitorio de Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth está desconsolada por la muerte de sus padres, ahora más que nunca necesita el apoyo de sus amigos. Dínora tortura psicológicamente a Gabriela, le dice que por su culpa, Raquel murió.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Arturo quiere comprobar la verdad sobre el oro y reta a Alcides a probárselo, lo cual compromete a Hugo a entrar a la mina. Soledad está muy confundida por el cambio que ha dado Alcides.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: El doctor Max tiene la firme intención de revelar la verdad sobre Aurora. Boris rescata a Hugo y Soledad se emociona, pero ella recapacita y rechaza a Alcides en frente de todos.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Eloísa tiene en sus manos la vida de quien cree es el único vínculo entre Soledad y Alcides, mientras la reacción de Arturo no se hace esperar al enterarse que su prometida está con su enemigo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Aunque Soledad es víctima de agresiones en el pueblo por la noticia publicada sobre la enfermedad de la niña, ella no se detiene y está dispuesta a comprobar la verdad sobre la muerte de Hugo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le dice a Ricardo que Alberto está en pleno uso de sus facultades mentales y puede rendir testimonio de la agresión. Pero los dos llegan muy tarde. Fríamente, Antonia le corta el flujo de aire y le habla a su examante, mientras lo ve morir.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams scour King Ludwig's quarters in the same castle that served as the inspiration for Sleeping Beauty's castle, and tempers flare during one Team's walk through a snowy labyrinth.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Two Teams hit the hay to see how well they stack up and Racers break out the sponges for an oily detour during the series first ever trip to Azerbaijan.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tears are shed as the claws come out in Tanzania and racers stand in amazement as they train alongside the Masai warriors.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race takes an unexpected turn when an early alliance is betrayed, and an unforgiving team savors the opportunity to exact their revenge in a game twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Gender disparities cause one Team to lose faith when a challenge seems insurmountable, and emotions run high as a Racer must weigh their own well-being against their future in the game.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One determined Racer powers through pain in the wake of a physical misstep, and teams pull out all of the bells and whistles for a larger than life challenge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four Teams battle for the $1 million prize in a grueling two-hour season finale that starts in Japan, where Racers call upon their track skills for an exhausting Japanese game show, and concludes in Hawaii.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Double Your Money

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team makes a bold move, but it could cost them the game, while another Racer breaks down amid the frustration of a Roadblock.

programme.desc: There's No Crying In Baseball

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Funky Monkey

programme.desc: Chill Out, Freak

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and four of his levelheaded friends and relatives are taken in by a con man's get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the loveable Koala to the feisty Tasmanian Devil, this adventure to the other side of the world uncovers some of the most unique animals on the planet. Plus Jack and his family get a special tour of the Australia Zoo from the Irwin family.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Habitats High & Low
programme.desc: Come along on today’s adventure to Australia’s Great Barrier Reef, Kenya’s Masai Mara, Panama’s Forest Canopy and many more amazing animal ecosystems, as Jack counts them down all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and Suzi as they meet some mighty meerkats living in California's desert, and visit a wolf sanctuary dedicated to saving the misunderstood species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes to work behind the scenes at the world-renowned Ann van Dyk Cheetah Center in South Africa where over 800 Cheetah cubs have been bred in the last 40 years. Jack also comes face-to-face with rare African Wild Dogs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Take a peek behind-the-scenes of some massive animal transport operations, all to help animals in need, like bringing a gorilla to his doctor’s appointment, herding blesbok to food-filled savannahs and many more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Tree for Me
programme.desc: The sky’s the limit on today’s countdown. Tigers, orangutans, leopards, monkeys and more! Find out which high-flying animal is number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to exotic Singapore for an adventure filled with some of the most fascinating creatures in the world.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and his family as they immerse themselves in the jungles of Peru.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is headed to South Africa to explore one of the most ground-breaking reserves on the continent – Shamwari. What once was old farming land, is now a meticulously restored eco-system brimming with wildlife and adventure.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue meet up with renowned conservationists Chryssee and Esmond Bradley Martin in Kenya and see hyenas, warthogs, and even a cheetah, before searching for white rhinos in Nairobi National Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack for all-canine countdown. Meet working dogs on patrol to save rhinos and find lost hikers, get a look at rare populations of African wild dogs, and meet some amazing dogs that provide love and companionship.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jack is exploring life below the surface with a dive down to Australia’s Great Barrier Reef, a submarine safari in the Cayman Islands, a highly classified mission with a sea lion, and lots of sharks.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Far Out Sightings
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for some super rare animal sightings. A lake-loving elephant, desert-dwelling flamingos, goats enjoying island life, zebras in California and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Most baby animals are adorable, but only a select few get to be called “cubs.” Come along with Jungle Jack as he counts down some cute and cuddly cubs, like lions, cheetahs, bears and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is eager to spot the animals on today’s countdown! Cheetah, painted dog, giraffe, a baby tapir and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Ever wonder what Jack's favorite animal encounters have been? Get ready to dive with the great white and meet it face-to-face. It's all part of the fun when Jack chooses his favorites on the next Animal Adventures!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family travel into the mountain gorillas' homeland, deep in the jungles of Rwanda's Volcanoes National Park. With only 700 of these great apes left in the wild, they learn first-hand what's being done to save the gentle giants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is in Malaysia getting a little closer than he would like to lots and lots of crocodiles! Then he has an unforgettable encounter with a King Cobra before trekking up into Batu Caves just outside of Kuala Lampur.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an adventure to the Loggerhead Marinelife Center in Juno Beach, Florida where conservationists are working to save endangered sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: The animals on today’s show like to stick together. Join Jungle Jack as he counts down the planet’s party animals, like baboons, buffalos, flamingos, painted dogs, and more wildebeest than you can imagine!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack leaves his safari truck behind and treks into the wild, on foot, to meet animals face-to-face. Come along as he encounters, Lions, Bats, Cheetahs, Hippos, Sea Turtles and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for a journey with the largest land mammals on Earth, the African Elephants, as he travels through their homeland of Tanzania.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Dive in for an epic adventure to the Galapagos Islands. Marine Iguanas, Giant Tortoises, Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he comes face-to-face with the powerful pachyderms of Chobe National Park. The park is known for its massive elephant population, but Jack also encounters Hippos, Cape Buffalo, Kudu, Crocs, Warthogs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi journey to the remote beaches of Santa Rosa National Park in Costa Rica to look for elusive jaguars that prey on nesting sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Deep in the Amazon River basin of Peru, Jack discovers a group of young conservationists working to save orphaned and injured animals at Taricaya Rescue Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack visits the Sao Paulo Zoo, where a small cat-breeding program aims to save many of Brazil's endangered wildcats including the Margay, Oncilla and Pampas Cat.

programme.title: Oliver's Twist
programme.desc: Jamie cooks marinated squid salad, pot roasted pork and a fruit cobbler for fans of the music group ABBA.

programme.title: Save With Jamie

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie gives traditional roast chicken a French twist; shows new ways to use up stale bread; and cooks up his take on a creamy prawn linguine for his friend and mentor Gennaro Contaldo.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie rustles up his restaurant-quality avocado hollandaise and then he gets his son Buddy involved in cooking a different pizza for all the family to enjoy.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day
programme.desc: Jamie demonstrates an easy tray bake, chicken and pepper jalfrezi, where the oven does all the hard work; pierogi dumplings stuffed with broccoli and cheese.

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver is in Rome, tracking down the fast, fresh and easy recipes the natives of the buzzing Italian capital city cook every day. He learns how to make tasty minty pea tortiglioni, and gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto.

programme.title: Jamie Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits Piedmont, in the snow-capped Italian Alps, to try some comfort food and to learn the secrets of the risotto queens of the rice fields.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie shows how to make a vegetarian chilli and pasta with three easy sauces, homemade tagliatelle, a cheat's carbonara, and a simple tomato sauce.

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a risotto, a seven-veggie sauce, and an egg-free chocolate cake, proving that it is not difficult to create great dishes from the simplest ingredients.

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Jamie cooks three varied recipes to showcase the versatility of beans.

programme.title: Jamie at Home

programme.title: Jamie at Home
programme.desc: Pickled courgettes with mint and chili; aubergines with garlic and oregano; fiery chili chutney.

programme.title: Jamie at Home

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Crispy Parma pork; minted courgettes; brown rice; grilled mushroom sub; smoky pancetta; melted cheese and pears.

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie cooks up some beef steak, hoisin prawn and noodle bowls, a mouth-watering mackerel dish, and mixed tomato and quinoa salad.

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Steak, liver and bacon; bubble and squeak mash and red onion gravy; Mexican tomato soup; chili nachos; veggie and feta sprinkles.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Today Jamie's rustling up Glazed pork fillet, Cajun-style pepper rice & BBQ sauce, plus Tapas bruschetta, golden grilled sardines.

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A teenager is abducted on a shopping trip. Two hikers disappear from the Appalachian Trail.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, Investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever …undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.
